---
id: reliability-scorecard-visual
title: Governance Reliability Scorecard (Visual)
owner: governance-steward
status: DRAFT
aspirational: true
---

# UIAO Governance Reliability Scorecard (Visual)

## Visual Representation of Owner Reliability Score Components

---

## Mermaid Diagram

[DIAGRAM-01: Top-down decomposition scorecard for the Owner Reliability Score, rendered as a colored hierarchical tree. Root box at top "Owner Reliability Score" filled in deep blue (#0D47A1) with white text. Five child component boxes arranged in a row beneath the root, all filled in mid blue (#1976D2) with white text: TTA Time-to-Acknowledge; TTR Time-to-Remediate; SLA Breaches; CI Failure Rate; Weekly Unacknowledged Items. Each component fans down to its leaf metric box(es) in lighter slate: TTA → "72h SLA Compliance"; TTR → "14d SLA Compliance"; SLA Breaches → two leaves stacked vertically ("At-Risk Count", "Breached Count"); CI Failure Rate → "Validator Accuracy"; Weekly Unacknowledged Items → "Backlog Size". Engineering blueprint style; the dashboard-style fills above are intentional and preserved from the original visual identity. White background, monospace labels, 16:9 landscape.]

---

## ASCII Scorecard

```
+---------------------------+
| OWNER RELIABILITY SCORE   |
+------+------+-------+-----+------+
|  TTA |  TTR |  SLA  |  CI | Unack|
|      |      |Breach | Fail|Items |
+------+------+-------+-----+------+
| 72h  | 14d  |At-Risk|Accur|Backlog
| SLA  | SLA  |Breach |     |      |
+------+------+-------+-----+------+
```

---

## Scoring Rules

| Component | Weight | Green | Yellow | Red |
|-----------|--------|-------|--------|-----|
| TTA (72h) | 25% | >95% | 80-95% | <80% |
| TTR (14d) | 25% | >90% | 75-90% | <75% |
| SLA At-Risk | 20% | 0 | 1-2 | >2 |
| SLA Breached | 20% | 0 | 1 | >1 |
| CI Failures | 5% | <1% | 1-3% | >3% |
| Unacked Items | 5% | 0 | 1-3 | >3 |

> **SSOT Reference:** See /ssot/UIAO-SSOT.md
